consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' from certificate matches the invoice issuer including name and address after normalization (versaler/gemener, company suffixes, standard abbreviations). Consignor is explicitly found in invoice header and address block. The country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization. No contradictions found.

goods_description.invoice_value:
12 Rolls: WTKL ref. Royal White
Subs 160gsm, RW 1800mm, DIA 1250mm, Core 100mm
10 Rolls: WTKL ref. Royal White
Subs 160gsm, RW 1750mm, DIA 1250mm, Core 100mm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'WHITE TOP KRAFT LINER' from certificate matches the invoice's description of 'WTKL ref. Royal White' rolls. Quantity total 22 rolls matches sum of 12 + 10 rolls in invoice. Article numbers are not explicitly provided, so text matching with allowed normalizations confirmed match. No semantic interpretation needed.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '49.865 Gross MT' in certificate matches exactly the 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.865 MT' in invoice. Both numeric value and unit are aligned. No conflicts or mismatches detected.

origin.motivation: Origin 'Sweden' in certificate is explicitly stated in the invoice under 'Country of Origin' and 'Made in Sweden'. EU-normalisation rule applies but is not needed as exact country is given. No contradictory origin data found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points matched between certificate and invoice without discrepancies.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontroller för avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten är korrekta och kan godkännas automatiskt.
